title: keppleria tigillaria
intro: Keppleria tigillaria, also known as the Tiger's Eye, is a type of fungus that belongs to the genus Keppleria in the family Hymenochaetaceae. This fungus has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antiviral, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Keppleria tigillaria include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Keppleria tigillaria can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
